raw_question_text:
A three-phase synchronous generator is to be connected to the infinite bus. The lamps are connected as shown in the <image> for the synchronization. The phase sequence of bus voltage is R-Y-B and that of incoming generator voltage is R'-Y'-B'.

It was found that the lamps are becoming dark in the sequence \( L_a - L_b - L_c \). It means that the phase sequence of the incoming generator is ______.
raw_answer_text: opposite to infinite bus and its frequency is more than infinite bus

choice_map.A: opposite to infinite bus and its frequency is more than infinite bus
choice_map.B: opposite to infinite bus but its frequency is less than infinite bus
choice_map.C: same as infinite bus and its frequency is more than infinite bus
choice_map.D: same as infinite bus and its frequency is less than infinite bus

extraction_notes: solution field contains only option letter; mapped to option text
image field is a PIL image object placeholder, not a path or URL
